# openai_invites (Data Source)

List organization invites.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "openai_invites" "example" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Synthetic data source identifier.
- `invites` (Attributes List) Invites returned by the API. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--invites))
- `response_json` (String) Raw JSON response returned by the OpenAI API.

<a id="nestedatt--invites"></a>
### Nested Schema for `invites`

Read-Only:

- `accepted_at` (Number) accepted at
- `created_at` (Number) created at
- `email` (String) email
- `expires_at` (Number) expires at
- `id` (String) id
- `role` (String) role
- `status` (String) status
